zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey Pigot of Melmerby於1295年出生在英國越可爾梅爾莫比時，他的父親Randolph Pigot26歲，母親Emma de Clotheram23歲。他與Johanna de Hawkswell結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1348年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey Pigot of Melmerby于1295年出生在英国越可爾梅爾莫比时，他的父亲Randolph Pigot26岁，母亲Emma de Clotheram23岁。他与Johanna de Hawkswell结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1348年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Pigot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Pickett
meanings: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Picot, Pigot, a pet form of Pic (see Pike 6). In Middle English, the form Piket (Old French Picquet) was also common.
sometimes a late development of   Pickard   1 or 2.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey Pigot of Melmerby was born in 1295, in Melmerby, Yorkshire, England, his father, Randolph Pigot, was 26 and his mother, Emma de Clotheram, was 23. He married Johanna de Hawkswell. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died after 1348.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey Pigot of Melmerby est né en 1295, à Melmerby, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Randolph Pigot, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Emma de Clotheram, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Johanna de Hawkswell. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé après 1348.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey Pigot of Melmerby 1295 in Melmerby, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Randolph Pigot 26 und seine Mutter Emma de Clotheram 23. Er hat Johanna de Hawkswell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb nach 1348.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey Pigot of Melmerby è nato il nel 1295 nel Melmerby, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Randolph Pigot, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Emma de Clotheram, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Johanna de Hawkswell. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1348.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Pigot of Melmerbyが1295年にイギリスヨークシュアイアメルメルビーで生まれた時，父Randolph Pigotは26歳，母Emma de Clotheramは23歳であった。Johanna de Hawkswellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1348年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Pigot of Melmerby(이)가 1295년 영국 요르크실르 멜머비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Randolph Pigot(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Clotheram(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Johanna de Hawkswell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1348년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey Pigot of Melmerby nasceu em 1295, em Melmerby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Randolph Pigot, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Clotheram, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna de Hawkswell. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1348.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey Pigot of Melmerby родился в 1295 г. в местности мелмирби, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Randolph Pigot было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma de Clotheram, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna de Hawkswell. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер после 1348 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffrey Pigot of Melmerby nació en 1295, en Melmerby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Randolph Pigot, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Emma de Clotheram, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Johanna de Hawkswell. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió después de 1348.
